context: The agent processes a discovery.json with verdict=SKIP. This scenario tests whether the agent correctly outputs the verdict, skip_reason, and search_attempted fields, then stops without proceeding to candidate sorting, presentation, or writing a selection.json.

checklist.name: SKIP verdict surfaced
checklist.description: selection-output.md explicitly mentions the verdict 'SKIP' (or 'verdict: SKIP') — the agent does not silently swallow the verdict value.

checklist.name: skip_reason shown
checklist.description: selection-output.md includes the skip_reason text from discovery.json (or a direct paraphrase of it) — the reason why the company was skipped.

checklist.name: search_attempted shown
checklist.description: selection-output.md includes the search_attempted value (true) from the discovery file.

checklist.name: No selection.json written
checklist.description: No file named selection.json exists in the workspace — the workflow correctly terminates at the SKIP branch without persisting any selection.

checklist.name: No candidate table
checklist.description: selection-output.md does NOT contain a ranked candidate table or list of skill_targets — Step 2 was not attempted.

checklist.name: Workflow terminates early
checklist.description: selection-output.md does not ask the user to pick a target or continue to later workflow steps — the output clearly signals that processing ended after the SKIP verdict.

checklist.name: SKIP is final output
checklist.description: The output does not contain any steps numbered 2, 3, 4, or 5 (or equivalent headings) — only the SKIP branch conclusion is documented.

checklist.name: No validate-selection.py run
checklist.description: There is no evidence of validate-selection.py being executed — no validation report in any file — consistent with no selection.json having been written.
